articles.title: Gautam Rode opens up on bond with Saraswatichandra co-star Jennifer Winget: ‘We hardly spoke for one and a half years’
articles.description: Gautam Rode said that there was no animosity on the set of Saraswatichandra, as he and co-star Jennifer Winget bonded after quite a long time.

articles.title: Dhurandhar star Rakesh Bedi shoots dance song with Nora Fatehi, calls her a ‘sensation’: I tried my best to compete
articles.description: Rakesh Bedi and Nora Fatehi agreed that the song has come out really well and they cannot wait for everyone to see it.

articles.title: Fergie ‘Looking For Escape Route’ After Royal Drama: Reports
articles.description: Sarah Ferguson is reportedly considering a major move away from the UK as speculation grows over a possible “escape route” from royal scrutiny. According to Fox News Digital, royal commentator Ian Pelham Turner claimed the former Duchess of York and Prince Andrew could relocate to Portugal following the exposure of Sarah’s luxury Austrian ski resort hideout. Turner suggested the couple, who have faced years of controversy and public backlash, may want a “simpler, quieter life” closer to daughter Princess Eugenie and her family. The rumors intensified after news of Eugenie’s third pregnancy sparked fresh attention around the York family and Prince Andrew’s ongoing scandals.

articles.title: 'Raja Shivaji' box office collection day 5 (Marathi): Riteish Deshmukh’s period drama adds Rs 3.35 crore to the tally
articles.description: Riteish Deshmukh's historical drama 'Raja Shivaji' is experiencing a strong box office run, particularly its Marathi version. The film, released on May 1, 2026, has garnered over Rs 30.5 crore in its first five days, with the Marathi version outperforming its Hindi counterpart. Despite a slight dip on its first Tuesday, the film continues to draw audiences.

articles.title: French team may visit after May 10 for Futala revival
articles.description: Nagpur: The revival of the long-defunct Futala musical fountain is now said to be in the final groundwork phase, with the last batch of specialised ca.

articles.title: Angelina Jolie scores win over Brad Pitt; court rules actress doesn't have to submit privileged emails
articles.description: Angelina Jolie has won a legal battle against ex-husband Brad Pitt concerning their French winery, Chateau Miraval. A court ruled she doesn't need to disclose emails related to the property sale, deeming them legally privileged. This decision overturns a previous order. The ongoing dispute over the winery continues, with a trial set for 2027.

articles.title: 'KD - The Devil' box office collections day 6: Weekend boost fades for Sanjay Dutt starrer; Rs 13.72 Cr India Net
articles.description: Dhruva Sarja's 'KD - The Devil' is currently in theaters, having garnered Rs 13.72 crore net in India by Day 6. Despite a star-studded cast including Sudeep and Sanjay Dutt, the film's performance has been steady but limited, with occupancy dipping to 25% on Day 6. The narrative unfolds in the 1970s Bengaluru underworld.

articles.title: Bella Ramsey’s 'Sunny Dancer' gets UK release date
articles.description: Bella Ramsey, acclaimed for 'The Last of Us', stars in the new British comedy-drama 'Sunny Dancer'. The film, premiering at Berlinale, follows a teenager's summer at a camp for young cancer survivors. With a strong cast including James Norton and Neil Patrick Harris, early reviews praise its sharp humor and poignant direction, promising a compelling cinematic experience.

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from Drawing Closer, 'We aren't just waiting...'
articles.description: Dialogue of the day: A simple reminder that life is not a waiting period for death, but something we are actively living every moment.

articles.title: 'Fauzi' tragedy; Crew member dies In Hyderabad crash
articles.description: A somber shadow has fallen over the team working on Prabhas' much-anticipated film 'Fauzi' as news breaks of a tragic road accident near Hyderabad, claiming the life of a crew member and leaving five others seriously injured.

articles.title: Riteish Deshmukh reacts to Raja Shivaji response
articles.description: Speaking about the reception, Riteish Deshmukh said Raja Shivaji has struck an emotional chord with audiences, with families coming together to watch the historical drama based on Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. He added that viewers are sharing their reactions online after watching the film. Riteish said organic word-of-mouth is the most rewarding phase for any filmmaker.

articles.title: Woman attacked by employer dies in hospital
articles.description: Thrissur: A 47-year-old woman from Vadanappally, whom her employer attacked in Bengaluru on Sunday, died while undergoing treatment at Jubilee Mission.

articles.title: Congress high command weighs Kerala CM pick
articles.description: T'puram: Congress high command stepped up deliberations to select the next chief minister as intense lobbying gathered momentum within the party follo.

articles.title: 'King' set leaks: Shah Rukh Khan shoots solo scenes - WATCH
articles.description: Fans are buzzing as leaked photos and videos from the South African sets of 'King' showcase Shah Rukh Khan filming solo scenes and an intimate dance sequence with Deepika Padukone. Director Siddharth Anand has urged fans to refrain from sharing leaked content, emphasizing the team's dedication to delivering a surprise cinematic experience.

articles.title: Bharatanatyam-jazz retelling of Shakuntala opera premieres in Bengaluru
articles.description: Pop opera Shakuntala: A Bharatanatyam-jazz retelling blends rock, jazz and pop with a gothic aesthetic, as Kevin Oliver reimagines the Mahabharata tale for stage, with LED visuals, anime backdrops and charity shows supporting Namma Shikshana aid.

articles.title: Utz recalls Zapp's, Dirty brand potato chips over salmonella risk
articles.description: Utz Quality Foods is voluntarily recalling several varieties of Zapp's and Dirty brand potato chips sold nationwide over concerns that the products may be contaminated with salmonella.

articles.title: “She’s aware of the risks”: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding takes a new turn as the pop star amps up her security
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are set to step into one of the most exciting phases of their lives as the world waits for their multi million dollar wedding which is slated to be one of the biggest and exciting events of the year. While there are speculations that the high profile couple have already locked in on 3rd July as their wedding date, it seems Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce might just be planning something else too.

articles.title: Donald Trump is seen worrying about Patrick Mahomes’ Week 1 return in a viral moment
articles.description: President Trump, at a White House Small Business Summit, prioritized inquiring about NFL star Patrick Mahomes' well-being over economic policy. The Mahomes family has known ties to Trump. Mahomes, recovering from a torn ACL and LCL, is reportedly throwing again and expected for Week 1 of the 2026 season, a positive update relayed by BBQ owners.

articles.title: Riteish Deshmukh on 'Raja Shivaji's success, emotional connection
articles.description: Riteish Deshmukh is happy with the positive response to his directorial 'Raja Shivaji', which has set a new record for Marathi cinema with a massive Rs 23.90 crore opening weekend, becoming the biggest opening day grosser ever for a Marathi film.

articles.title: 7 Salman Khan’s Inspirational Quotes That Are Life Lessons For People To Deal With Tough Times
articles.description: Salman Khan is an inspiration to many. He has gone through a lot of difficult phases of his life. Have a look at his 7 quotes that are life lessons for people.

articles.description: Gaurav Gera has shared how Dhurandhar’s now-popular line 'Darling Darling Dil Kyu Toda Ajao Pilo Dudh Soda' was finalised. Before it reached the screen, several quirky alternatives were tried by the team.

articles.title: Maharashtra makes GPS-based digital locks must in vehicles transporting liquor from June 1
articles.description: Mumbai: Maharashtra government has made mandatory digital locks with real-time GPS tracking for all liquor-spirit transport vehicles, covering intra-s.

articles.title: Meet Janaki Ammal: The scientist whose research powers India’s sugarcane revolution and ethanol growth
articles.description: Dr. E. K. Janaki Ammal's pioneering work in plant genetics significantly boosted India's sugarcane production. By developing hybrid varieties suited to local climates, she enabled higher sugar yields, transforming the sector. Her research laid the groundwork for India's current status as a major sugar producer and a key player in ethanol production, contributing to energy security.

articles.title: Donald Trump watches 16-year-olds dance? Resurfaced Trump resort video sparks explosive online allegations
articles.description: A viral clip of the US President triggers fierce backlash and Epstein comparisons.

articles.description: Pooja Hegde has proven her versatility through films like Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo and Most Eligible Bachelor. Balancing glamour and performance, she continues to grow as a pan-India star. Here are must-watch films of the Jana Nayagan star.

articles.title: Christopher Nolan calls The Odyssey the ‘Marvel of its day’, Links myths to superheroes
articles.description: Christopher Nolan has offered a unique take on superheroes, linking them back to ancient mythology rather than modern comics. Speaking on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, he suggested that stories like The Odyssey reflect the earliest form of superhero narratives.

articles.title: Gaurav Khanna EXCLUSIVE: On Doing Khatron Ke Khiladi, Farhanna Bhatt, Bigg Boss & More | N18V
articles.description: After lifting the trophy of Bigg Boss 19, Anupamaa fame Gaurav Khanna is all set to take on new challenges with Khatron Ke Khiladi 15. Ahead of it, he spoke to News18 Showsha about his fears, how he feels about doing the show with Farhanna Bhatt, whom he had major fights with in Bigg Boss, and more. Watch this full interview to catch the candid insights your favourite actor has to share.

articles.title: Satyajit Ray’s rendezvous with aliens
articles.description: Satyajit Ray was 10 when he first encountered sci-fi in his grand uncle Kuladaranjan’s Bengali translation of Jules Verne’s ‘Mysterious Island’. He was fascinated by how the story tickled his imagination while remaining anchored in scientific details.

articles.title: ‘Maskara’ song from ‘Main Vaapas Aaunga’ out: Netizens react to Sharvari and Vedang Raina’s chemistry and on-screen romance
articles.description: Just in: The enchanting new track 'Maskara' from Imtiaz Ali's upcoming film 'Main Vaapas Aaunga' features fresh talents Sharvari and Vedang Raina. Crafted by the legendary AR Rahman with thought-provoking lyrics from Irshad Kamil, early reactions are mixed—listeners are enchanted by Vedang's singing, yet there are some opinions on the romantic pair's dynamic and style.

articles.title: Pulkit Samrat Says 'Lack of Choice’ Behind Fewer Projects: 'Script Has To Be Exciting' | Exclusive
articles.description: Pulkit Samrat says his limited projects stem from lack of strong scripts, not choice, adding he seeks challenging roles like Glory that offer depth.

articles.title: Looking at Vijay Thalapathy’s biggest box office hits
articles.description: Vijay Thalapathy's journey over the years reflects his rise from a steady commercial performer to one of Indian cinema’s most bankable superstars. Known for combining mass appeal with hit music and compelling storytelling, his films regularly dominate the box office. Here’s a look at the biggest blockbusters that have defined his career.

articles.title: Ima Sabitri: “Despite the chaos, we cannot cease our work in theatre”
articles.description: The Manipuri legend, who has played the lead in Pebet for 51 years, on the challenges of motherhood across the world, the plays closest to her heart, and the continuing importance of theatre

articles.title: Nick Cannon on letting son Moroccan date at 15 but not daughter Monroe: 'I am more protective of my daughter'
articles.description: Nick Cannon revealed a double standard in his parenting, allowing his 15-year-old son, Moroccan, to date while being more protective of his twin daughter, Monroe. He cited concerns for young women's safety and a desire to shield Monroe from potential harm, even vowing to go to jail if she's ever physically harmed.

articles.title: Backyard Ant-Wasp Discovery: 8-year-old spots oak galls with ants; study reveals seed-like chemical lure
articles.description: A young boy's backyard discovery revealed a surprising connection. Wasps trick ants into moving oak galls, similar to how ants move seeds. This happens because galls have a special part that smells like seeds to ants. This clever adaptation helps protect wasp larvae. The finding highlights nature's hidden systems and the value of curiosity.

articles.title: Alia Bhatt to play a crucial role in Sohum Shah's 'Tumbbad 2'
articles.description: Alia Bhatt has officially joined the cast of 'Tumbbad 2', the highly anticipated sequel to the 2018 cult classic. Playing a "power-packed" 20-day role, her character will reportedly serve as the bridge to the final chapter, 'Tumbbad 3'. Mounted on a massive Rs. 100 crore budget, the film also stars Nawazuddin Siddiqui and is slated for a theatrical release on December 3, 2027.

articles.title: 'TN 07 CM 2026’: Did Thalapathy Vijay Hint At Political Ambitions In This Viral GOAT Scene?
articles.description: Thalapathy Vijay is set to stake a claim to form the government in Tamil Nadu, even as his party falls short of a clear majority in the recently concluded Assembly elections.

articles.title: 10 early signs your child may be exceptionally bright
articles.description: What makes early intelligence so fascinating is that it rarely looks one-dimensional. A highly intelligent child may be advanced in some areas and unusually sensitive, stubborn or distracted in others. The signs are often scattered, subtle and deeply personal. Here are 10 early clues that may suggest your child has exceptional mental potential.

articles.title: Vijay's Party Gets Tamil Nadu Gold, Pooja Hedge Asks 'Jana Nayagan' For A Party
articles.description: Vijay's party, the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), has emerged as the single largest party in the state, winning 107 out of the 234 seats

articles.title: When Raima Sen met a ghost during Phool Pishi O Edward!
articles.description: During a hotel stay for a film shoot, actress Raima Sen became convinced her room was haunted after hearing voices. She reported the 'ghost' to the directors, only to discover the noise was actually coming from a neighboring room where co-star Shaheb Chatterjee was having a party.

articles.title: Heidi Klum turns living statue at 2026 Met Gala look
articles.description: Heidi Klum stunned at the 2026 Met Gala, embodying a classical statue with a remarkable latex and spandex creation. Inspired by iconic sculptures, her look perfectly captured the 'Fashion Is Art' theme. This bold, transformative style aligns with Klum's history of unforgettable, often Halloween-themed, appearances, solidifying her place at the forefront of creative red carpet fashion.

articles.title: The Movie Star And His Mandate: After 108-Seat Debut, What Next For Vijay
articles.description: This is the interval. The break-for-snacks pause before the second half of Vijay's new political blockbuster rolls on - plotlines and characters converging as the story races for its big finale....

articles.title: Hugh Jackman 'cried three times' after reading The Sheep Detectives script: 'This story is full of heart'
articles.description: In The Sheep Detectives, Hugh Jackman plays a shepherd whose untimely death forces his flock of sheep to turn detectives to unravel the mystery.

articles.title: Peddi: Countdown Begins For Ram Charan Starrer Sports Drama, Makers Drop New Poster
articles.description: The makers have already released several promotional assets from Peddi, including the teaser, posters and songs, each of which has helped build curiosity around the film’s world.

articles.title: Adivi Sesh to explore romance after Dacoit success; signs G2 and two love stories
articles.description: After the success of Dacoit, Adivi Sesh is set to explore a new phase in his career by taking on two romantic dramas. While continuing his action streak with G2, the actor aims to expand his range with more emotionally driven stories.

articles.title: In Rs 142 Crore Necklace, Hyderabad Billionaire Sudha Reddy Dazzles at Met Gala
articles.description: Sudha Reddy's Rs 142 crore necklace stole the show at the 2026 Met Gala.

articles.title: Amitabh Bachchan grieves loss of fan from Allahabad
articles.description: Amitabh Bachchan mourned the death of fan Shalini Singh, whom he considered family. In an emotional blog post, he expressed grief and offered prayers, saying such loss is hard to articulate. The actor was last seen in Vettaiyan and is working on Kalki 2898 AD and Ramayana Part 1 sequel.
